title: Validate Non-Admin User Authentication Guide
description:
## Context
Validate that the Salesforce Admin Install Guide at datatoolspro.com/tutorials/salesforce-admin-install-guide works correctly for non-admin users authenticating with DataTools Pro.

## Testing
- Created a new Trailhead org
- Added a non-admin user
- Followed the install guide to install the connected app as admin
- Authenticated successfully with the non-admin user

## Result
Guide works correctly. Non-admin users can authenticate after the admin installs the connected app.
acceptance_criteria: Non-admin users can authenticate following the install guide
Install guide instructions are accurate and complete
implementation_notes: Validation task. Tested with a fresh Trailhead org and non-admin user. Authentication works correctly after admin installs the connected app.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed successful testing with a new Trailhead org and non-admin user.
